checks.evidence: Server and public network values must match.
Mainnet build and runtime resolution require a dedicated XRPL_MAINNET_SOURCE_TAG plus explicit gate and Source Tag approvals, with no Testnet fallback.
Exact XRP and RLUSD Mainnet identities are machine-validated and runtime access requires explicit Mainnet gate approval.

Validated-ledger account and trust-line checks fail closed for account existence, destination tags, Deposit Authorization, exact issuer and currency identity, authorization, freeze state, and remaining trust-line capacity.
Network-scoped provider requests force the selected XRPL network, revalidate canonical Asset identity, require explicit Mainnet access, and persist request identity.

Network-scoped Mainnet transaction reads require explicit gate approval and XRP verification checks validated ledger status, tesSUCCESS, exact payer, destination, drops, delivered amount, tags, InvoiceID, and Mainnet idempotency identity.

The canonical RLUSD verifier accepts only the official network-scoped Asset identity and requires validated-ledger tesSUCCESS plus exact payer, destination, issuer, currency, requested amount, delivered amount, tags, InvoiceID, and Mainnet receipt identity.

MAINNET_OPERATIONS_MODE defaults to halted, supports verify-only draining and full halt, guards handoff creation and verification before external services, and exposes a no-store public operations status.
